Finding ID: FEAS-001
Specialist: Feasibility Analyst
Severity: Minor
Confidence: High
Document: RHAISTRAT-1234
Citation: Section 2.1, paragraph 1
Title: Effort estimate could be more granular
Evidence: Section 2.1 provides a high-level estimate of "2 sprints" but does not break down the effort by component. While the overall estimate appears reasonable given the scope described in Section 1, a per-component breakdown would improve planning accuracy and help identify bottleneck areas early.
Recommended fix: Add per-component effort estimates in Section 2.1.
Verdict: Approve
